assets.alt: Flat head-on liquid-glass artifact tray on a lavender and periwinkle mesh background
assets.caption: A strong example makes the public post inspectable: the person, the work, the asset, and the lesson a buyer can use.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG
assets.notes: Regenerated with the flat head-on two-color Sell In Public liquid-glass hero process. Background uses one main color plus one close complementary color; graphic is front-facing with no isometric or angled perspective.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1896x830 landscape crop
Source context from article: The article studies employee-generated content examples from Clay, Lovable, GitLab, and Shopify Engineering. The core idea is that strong examples make firsthand work inspectable: the public artifact, the person behind it, and the lesson a buyer can use.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor: one front-facing flat liquid-glass artifact tray holding three abstract evidence slips. Only one hero object. No social post card, no dashboard, no chart, no browser window, no row of separate cards.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shape. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1896x830. One centered flat tray object with quiet space around it. The glass/white graphic must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like a 2D interface parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only lavender and periwinkle. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: One front-facing flat liquid-glass tray, with three small abstract slip shapes inside it and a few short non-readable white lines. No charts, no numbers, no window controls, no metrics.
Detail density: Very low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, charts, line graphs, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, multiple cards, browser windows, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.
